holdings.infoBox: GSUS is an equity ETF with a total of 416 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.62%, Apple at 6.75%, Microsoft at 4.43%, Amazon.com at 3.63%, and Alphabet at 3.37%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs MarketBeta U.S. Equity ETF (GSUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of US equities selected and weighted by market capitalization. GSUS was launched on May 12, 2020 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
infoTable: Solactive GBS United States Large & Mid Cap Index
